positive: An intricate, stylized illustration of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune), depicted in a confident, elegant pose. The fox should be surrounded by glowing arcane geometric patterns and stylized blooming chrysanthemums. Use a vibrant color palette dominated by deep sapphire blues, ethereal gold accents, and pops of rich magenta. The composition must be centered and highly detailed, featuring a strong, clean silhouette suitable for screen printing on apparel. The style should blend Art Nouveau organic lines with modern neo-tribal geometric mandalas. Lighting should be dramatic and backlit, emphasizing the luminous glow of the magical elements. Clean vector lines, symmetrical composition, high contrast, minimal gradient areas.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, low quality, extra limbs, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, copyright, cartoon, photorealism, messy background
